title: 50 years of Dutch immunology--founders, institutions, highlights.
author_string: Gmelig-Meyling, Frits H J, Meyaard, Linde, Mebius, Reina E
abstract: At the occasion of the 50th anniversary of the Dutch Society for Immunology (DSI, de Nederlandse Vereniging voor Immunologie), this contribution deals with some highlights of 50 years of Immunology in the Netherlands. It narrates about the founders and first board members of the DSI, their institutes, progeny and patrimony, describes major centers of immunological activities, mentions key persons in the field, and touches upon some events dear to the Society and its members.
